meaning: n.太空行走,在航天舱外的活动
examples: The first person to go on a spacewalk in the world was Alexei Leonov from Russia.
When on a spacewalk, astronauts use safety tethers to stay close to their spacecraft.
For every one hour, they will spend on a spacewalk, astronauts need to train seven hours in the pool.
The entire spacewalk lasted four hours and two minutes, the shortest of the three.
The Discovery crews spent much of Wednesday getting ready for a spacewalk scheduled for Thursday morning.
